        sieve = [False] * (max_index + 1)
    else:
        sieve = [True] * (max_index + 1)

        for i in range(2, int(math.isqrt(max_index)) + 1):

    for i in range(len(nums)):
        if sieve[i]:
            sumA += nums[i]
        else:
            sumB += nums[i]
